```{=html}
<div class="year-banner"><div class="portrait" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div><div class="year-num">2019</div><div class="year-meta">7,246 posts this year. Showing first 300.</div></div></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<div id="year-months" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12"], y: [369, 250, 396, 420, 668, 489, 667, 677, 753, 929, 767, 861],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#0A2540" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 30, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      height: 210, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("year-months", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>

Jan 01, 2019  04:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Heads of countries are calling wanting to know why Senator Schumer is not approving their otherwise approved Ambassadors!? Likewise in Government lawyers and others are being delayed at a record pace! 360 great and hardworking people are waiting for approval from....&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Jan 01, 2019  04:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....Senator Schumer</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Jan 01, 2019  07:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;HAPPY NEW YEAR! https://t.co/bHoPDPQ7G6&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1079888205351145472" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1079888205351145472" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2019  08:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;MEXICO IS PAYING FOR THE WALL through the many billions of dollars a year that the U.S.A. is saving through the new Trade Deal</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1079900120047603713" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1079900120047603713" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2019  08:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats will probably submit a Bill</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1079902957938925568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1079902957938925568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2019  09:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...Remember this. Throughout the ages some things NEVER get better and NEVER change. You have Walls and you have Wheels. It was ALWAYS that way and it will ALWAYS be that way! Please explain to the Democrats that there can NEVER be a replacement for a good old fashioned WALL!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Jan 01, 2019  10:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @WhiteHouse: 2018 has been a year of historic accomplishments! https://t.co/6Iq5CFVdwY&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Jan 01, 2019  22:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080109395357380613" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080109395357380613" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2019  22:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: Jobless claims fell last week to a 49-year low. Yet another sign that @realDonaldTrump’s economic policies are working and America’s workforce is thriving.  https://t.co/Syrbyinq5r&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080114081795842049" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080114081795842049" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2019  22:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: .@realDonaldTrump made sure the men and women of the Coast Guard continue to get paid during the #SchumerShutdown.   Meanwhile</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080114559925567488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080114559925567488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2019  22:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: Heads of countries are calling wanting to know why Senator Schumer is not approving their otherwise approved Ambassadors!? Last assignment a total bust. Known for big</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080124615920373760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080124615920373760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2019  23:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;One thing has now been proven. The Democrats do not care about Open Borders and all of the crime and drugs that Open Borders bring!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080129307446513666" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080129307446513666" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  02:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to President  @JairBolsonaro who just made a great inauguration speech - the U.S.A. is with you!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080164786330132480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080164786330132480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  03:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Border Security and the Wall “thing” and Shutdown is not where Nancy Pelosi wanted to start her tenure as Speaker! Let’s make a deal?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080177487517233157" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080177487517233157" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  06:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Gas prices are low and expected to go down this year. This would be good!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080233215615557632" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080233215615557632" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  06:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Washington Examiner - “MAGA list: 205 ‘historic results’ help Trump make case for 2020 re-election.”  True!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080235018310635521" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080235018310635521" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  07:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Kim Jong Un says North Korea will not make or test nuclear weapons</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080240049780940800" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080240049780940800" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  07:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Do you think it’s just luck that gas prices are so low</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080247182186430465" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080247182186430465" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  08:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;For FAR TOO LONG Senate Democrats have been Obstructing more than 350 Nominations. These great Americans left their jobs to serve our Country</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080263362183917568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080263362183917568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  20:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Here we go with Mitt Romney</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080447092882112512" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080447092882112512" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2019  21:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Mexico is paying for the Wall through the new USMCA Trade Deal. Much of the Wall has already been fully renovated or built. We have done a lot of work. $5.6 Billion Dollars that House has approved is very little in comparison to the benefits of National Security. Quick payback!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080457560291987457" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080457560291987457" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2019  08:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Important meeting today on Border Security with Republican and Democrat Leaders in Congress. Both parties must work together to pass a Funding Bill that protects this Nation and its people – this is the first and most important duty of government...&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080616636363743234" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080616636363743234" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2019  08:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...I remain ready and willing to work with Democrats to pass a bill that secures our borders</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080616637932421121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080616637932421121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2019  12:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Sadly</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080677601046347777" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080677601046347777" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2019  22:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“MAGA list: 205 ‘historic results’ help Trump make case for 2020 re-election” https://t.co/vtqnUwdhjB&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080835412271222785" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080835412271222785" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2019  22:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Shutdown is only because of the 2020 Presidential Election. The Democrats know they can’t win based on all of the achievements of “Trump</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080837263913832449" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080837263913832449" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2019  22:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The United States Treasury has taken in MANY billions of dollars from the Tariffs we are charging China and other countries that have not treated us fairly. In the meantime we are doing well in various Trade Negotiations currently going on. At some point this had to be done!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080839254656405504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080839254656405504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2019  00:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/JzfXMAPwKP&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080858959404240896" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080858959404240896" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2019  01:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The RNC has a great Chairwoman in Ronna McDaniel and the @GOP has never been stronger. We achieved historic wins with her help last year! #MAGA🇺🇸&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080881680779542533" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080881680779542533" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2019  04:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/jsOrDtwdEa&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080923073820282880" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080923073820282880" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2019  09:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Michael Pillsbury interviewed by @cvpayne: “They have the motive of making the President look bad – instead of President Trump being portrayed as a HERO. The first President to take China on</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080997060168552448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080997060168552448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2019  09:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....President Trump deserves a lot of credit</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Jan 04, 2019  21:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;As I have stated many times</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081175076727345152" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081175076727345152" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2019  21:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;How do you impeach a president who has won perhaps the greatest election of all time</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081177511592108032" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081177511592108032" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081198344645554176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081198344645554176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  04:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Job growth surges by 312</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081288316236967937" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081288316236967937" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  05:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The story in the New York Times regarding Jim Webb being considered as the next Secretary of Defense is FAKE NEWS. I’m sure he is a fine man</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081305634115674112" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081305634115674112" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  09:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great new book by Dr. Robert Jeffress</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081357291914477568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081357291914477568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  20:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Kanye West for your nice words. Criminal Justice Reform is now law - passed in a very bipartisan way!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081525114594832384" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081525114594832384" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  20:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great support coming from all sides for Border Security (including Wall) on our very dangerous Southern Border. Teams negotiating this weekend! Washington Post and NBC reporting of events</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081528502602612736" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081528502602612736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  20:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats could solve the Shutdown problem in a very short period of time. All they have to do is approve REAL Border Security (including a Wall)</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081535102461579264" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081535102461579264" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  21:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Many people currently a part of my opposition</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081549802595340288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081549802595340288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  22:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I don’t care that most of the workers not getting paid are Democrats</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081563196249513985" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081563196249513985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  23:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We are working hard at the Border</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081570073867927557" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081570073867927557" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2019  23:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats want Billions of Dollars for Foreign Aid</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081579754191552514" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081579754191552514" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  00:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great Tweet today by Tyler Q. Houlton @SpoxDHS on the #FakeNews being put out by @CNN</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081584385512607745" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081584385512607745" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  01:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Former @NYTimes editor Jill Abramson rips paper&#x27;s ‘unmistakably anti-Trump’ bias.”  Ms. Abramson is 100% correct. Horrible and totally dishonest reporting on almost everything they write. Hence the term Fake News</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081603056846991361" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081603056846991361" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  04:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Drug makers and companies are not living up to their commitments on pricing. Not being fair to the consumer</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081653927337213952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081653927337213952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  05:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;V.P. Mike Pence and team just left the White House. Briefed me on their meeting with the Schumer/Pelosi representatives. Not much headway made today. Second meeting set for tomorrow. After so many decades</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081658090792148993" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081658090792148993" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  09:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Jobs up big</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081717108176752640" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081717108176752640" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  09:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“The number of employed Americans has now set a 14th record under President Trump. Over the year</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081725924457041921" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081725924457041921" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  09:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;AP-NORC POLL: “Immigration among the top concerns in 2019.” People want to stop drugs and criminals at the Border. Want Border Security! Tell the Dems to do the inevitable now</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081729046277509121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081729046277509121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  10:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will be going to Camp David tomorrow morning for meetings on Border Security and many other topics with @WhiteHouse senior staff.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081733714437201922" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081733714437201922" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  10:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/iSFAokoIP7&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081735898679701505" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081735898679701505" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  20:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“We simply cannot allow people to pour into the United States undetected</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081883505049636864" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081883505049636864" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  20:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....The only reason they do not want to build a Wall is that Walls Work! 99% of our illegal Border crossings will end</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081891545245278208" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081891545245278208" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  20:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: As I have stated many times</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081893412687761408" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081893412687761408" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  20:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: How do you impeach a president who has won perhaps the greatest election of all time</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081893492291497984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081893492291497984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  22:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Excited to see our friends in Egypt opening the biggest Cathedral in the Middle East. President El-Sisi is moving his country to a more inclusive future!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081928260093652999" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081928260093652999" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  23:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our GREAT MILITARY has delivered justice for the heroes lost and wounded in the cowardly attack on the USS Cole. We have just killed the leader of that attack</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081935373914259458" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081935373914259458" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2019  05:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;V.P. Mike Pence and group had a productive meeting with the Schumer/Pelosi representatives today. Many details of Border Security were discussed. We are now planning a Steel Barrier rather than concrete. It is both stronger &amp;amp; less obtrusive. Good solution</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082032550112047104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082032550112047104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2019  20:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;With all of the success that our Country is having</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082259636227620865" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082259636227620865" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2019  21:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...The Fake News will knowingly lie and demean in order make the tremendous success of the Trump Administration</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082262839501508609" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082262839501508609" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2019  21:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....The Fake News Media in our Country is the real Opposition Party. It is truly the Enemy of the People! We must bring honesty back to journalism and reporting!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082268365081767936" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082268365081767936" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2019  21:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congressman Adam Smith</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082270271426433025" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082270271426433025" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2019  22:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Failing New York Times has knowingly written a very inaccurate story on my intentions on Syria. No different from my original statements</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082289526339448832" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082289526339448832" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2019  02:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am pleased to inform you that I will Address the Nation on the Humanitarian and National Security crisis on our Southern Border. Tuesday night at 9:00 P.M. Eastern.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082347305699889157" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082347305699889157" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2019  11:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Endless Wars</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082484663216730113" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082484663216730113" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2019  21:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Economic numbers looking REALLY good. Can you imagine if I had long term ZERO interest rates to play with like the past administration</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082623264877432837" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082623264877432837" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2019  21:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“The President is the biggest and best supporter of the Steel Industry in many years. We are now doing really well. The Tariffs let us compete. Was unfair that the Steel Industry lost its jobs to unfair trade laws. Very positive outcome.” Mark Glyptis</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082626249984491520" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082626249984491520" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2019  21:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Talks with China are going very well!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1082627015235256321" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1082627015235256321" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2019  22:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to a truly great football team</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 10, 2019  11:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Mainstream Media has NEVER been more dishonest than it is now. NBC and MSNBC are going Crazy. They report stories</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083207607412760576" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083207607412760576" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  11:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Gave an OFF THE RECORD luncheon</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083210083771785216" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083210083771785216" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  11:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @charliekirk11: This is why we need a wall  Illegal immigration is a serious threat to our country  90% of all heroin comes across the border  Thousands of kids are Sex trafficked  Illegals cost US taxpayers $135 billion a year  We support the shutdown for a wall!  RT!   https://t.co/97bN8L3ukp&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083210698921074688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083210698921074688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  11:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @charliekirk11: President Trump is winning this shutdown fight  Democrats have no message</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083210819691786240" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083210819691786240" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  11:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @charliekirk11: Did you know:  At our Southern Border</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083210934984867841" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083210934984867841" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  11:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @charliekirk11: Governor Ron DeSantis suspends the horrible Sheriff Scott Israel who is largely responsible for the errors leading up to Parkland Shooting  A man of action</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083211644275171328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083211644275171328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  11:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @parscale: Just received my newest voter score tracking from my team. @realDonaldTrump has reached his highest national approval rating since I started tracking. The @TheDemocrats have really made a mistake going with their gut over data.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083211756669976577" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083211756669976577" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  12:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @dbongino: New Poll: Vast Majority of Voters Believe There is &#x27;Crisis&#x27; or &#x27;Problem&#x27; at U.S. Border https://t.co/bzFimBid26&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083214771648937984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083214771648937984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  21:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Cryin Chuck told his favorite lie when he used his standard sound bite that I “slammed the table &amp;amp; walked out of the room. He had a temper tantrum.” Because I knew he would say that</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083353895030702080" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083353895030702080" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  21:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There is GREAT unity with the Republicans in the House and Senate</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 10, 2019  21:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Great support for Border Security and the Wall.” @foxandfriends  Even greater than anyone would know! “Presidents supporters do not want him to cave.” @SteveDoocy I won’t!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083358150214979585" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083358150214979585" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  21:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Getting ready to leave for the Great State of Texas! #MAGA&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083358611315789826" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083358611315789826" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2019  21:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083358775925460992" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083358775925460992" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2019  00:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;President Obama</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083404900862545920" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083404900862545920" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2019  02:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Because of the Democrats intransigence on Border Security and the great importance of Safety for our Nation</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083426878336036865" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083426878336036865" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2019  02:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SenateGOP: Why do we need border security? This is why. These are the facts. #SecureOurBorder https://t.co/dMpYb3p4Wy&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083427505736839168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083427505736839168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2019  06:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;From the Southern Border.... https://t.co/Vgsf5nEZUH&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp;
