Jan 11, 2019  20:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;H1-B holders in the United States can rest assured that changes are soon coming which will bring both simplicity and certainty to your stay</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083705208834834433" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083705208834834433" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  00:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Humanitarian Crisis at our Southern Border. I just got back and it is a far worse situation than almost anyone would understand</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083756525196320773" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083756525196320773" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  00:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...The Steel Barrier</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083759500618805254" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083759500618805254" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  01:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Fake News Media keeps saying we haven’t built any NEW WALL. Below is a section just completed on the Border. Anti-climbing feature included. Very high</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083783112973320192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083783112973320192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  06:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @WhiteHouse: This afternoon</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083848903072645120" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083848903072645120" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  06:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @WhiteHouse: This is common sense. Jan 12, 2019  07:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I look forward to hosting</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083861205549232128" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083861205549232128" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  07:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;.@CNN called a San Diego news station (@KUSINews) for negative reports on the Wall. When the station said that Walls work</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083868608919420930" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083868608919420930" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  20:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wow</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084058813047681025" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084058813047681025" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  20:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...Funny thing about James Comey. Everybody wanted him fired</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084062079907229697" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084062079907229697" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  20:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....the FBI was in complete turmoil (see N.Y. Post) because of Comey’s poor leadership and the way he handled the Clinton mess (not to mention his usurpation of powers from the Justice Department). My firing of James Comey was a great day for America. He was a Crooked Cop......&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084065832941031424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084065832941031424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  20:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;.....who is being totally protected by his best friend</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084070845826371586" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084070845826371586" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  21:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I have been FAR tougher on Russia than Obama</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084074865496334336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084074865496334336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  22:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Lyin’ James Comey</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084092774633353217" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084092774633353217" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  22:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats should come back to Washington and work to end the Shutdown</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084094708144619525" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084094708144619525" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  22:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;23% of Federal inmates are illegal immigrants. Border arrests are up 240%. In the Great State of Texas</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084098258534891521" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084098258534891521" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  22:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats could solve the Shutdown in 15 minutes! Call your Dem Senator or Congresswoman/man. Tell them to get it done! Humanitarian Crisis.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084099445556502528" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084099445556502528" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2019  23:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I just watched a Fake reporter from the Amazon Washington Post say the White House is “chaotic</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084117143988461571" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084117143988461571" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  00:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....I do have a plan on the Shutdown. But to understand that plan you would have to understand the fact that I won the election</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084119654841364480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084119654841364480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  00:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We have a massive Humanitarian Crisis at our Southern Border. We will be out for a long time unless the Democrats come back from their “vacations” and get back to work. I am in the White House ready to sign!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084121557193146368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084121557193146368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  02:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/3IH1yW2eTg&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084153087785349125" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084153087785349125" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  09:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be interviewed by Jeanine Pirro at 9:00 P.M. on @FoxNews. Watch @JesseBWatters before and @greggutfeld after. All terrific people. I am in the White House waiting for Cryin’ Chuck and Nancy to call so we can start helping our Country both at the Border and from within!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084263052617412609" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084263052617412609" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  22:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats are saying that DACA is not worth it and don’t want to include in talks. Many Hispanics will be coming over to the Republican side</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084464695904530432" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084464695904530432" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  23:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The building of the Wall on the Southern Border will bring down the crime rate throughout the entire Country!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084465310848163840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084465310848163840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  23:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I’m in the White House</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084466503574016006" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084466503574016006" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  23:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The damage done to our Country from a badly broken Border - Drugs</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084474165976018944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084474165976018944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2019  23:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thousands of illegal aliens who have committed sexual crimes against children are right now in Texas prisons. Most came through our Southern Border. We can end this easily - We need a Steel Barrier or Wall. Walls Work! John Jones</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084476603269373953" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084476603269373953" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  06:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wish I could share with everyone the beauty and majesty of being in the White House and looking outside at the snow filled lawns and Rose Garden. Really is something - SPECIAL COUNTRY</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084571124556619776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084571124556619776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  06:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Starting the long overdue pullout from Syria while hitting the little remaining ISIS territorial caliphate hard</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084584259510304768" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084584259510304768" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  11:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Trump portrait of an unsustainable Border Crisis is dead on. “In the last two years</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Jan 14, 2019  20:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Gas prices drop across the United States because President Trump has deregulated Energy and we are now  producing a great deal more oil than ever before.” @foxandfriends  But this is bad news for Russia</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084785809000185862" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084785809000185862" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: It didn&#x27;t get the attention it deserved</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084786495398072320" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084786495398072320" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are not negotiating in good faith with @realDonaldTrump.   Instead</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084786623320150016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084786623320150016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GeraldoRivera: Based on the record</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084786824516653057" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084786824516653057" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: Economic policies that @realDonaldTrump and @IvankaTrump have championed are producing some fantastic results for America’s young women.   The labor participation divide between millennial men and women is the lowest it’s ever been! https://t.co/dSZ5tQ6WHE&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084786926367002624" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084786926367002624" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: Smugglers are flooding our communities with drugs.  *300 Americans die each week from heroin</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084787164574040064" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084787164574040064" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I’ve been waiting all weekend. Democrats must get to work now. Border must be secured!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084788012725166080" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084788012725166080" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Nancy and Cryin’ Chuck can end the Shutdown in 15 minutes. At this point it has become their</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084788796011491330" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084788796011491330" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Getting ready to address the Farm Convention today in Nashville</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084790393764364288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084790393764364288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  20:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Dems in Puerto Rico as Shutdown hits day 24.” @foxandfriends&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084791040291282944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084791040291282944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  21:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Fake News gets crazier and more dishonest every single day. Amazing to watch as certain people covering me</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084808599124221954" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084808599124221954" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2019  23:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/w5X8jqvtiS&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084839940972638208" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084839940972638208" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  02:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Getting ready to go on stage at the #AFBF100 in New Orleans - packed house! Jan 15, 2019  04:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @DonaldJTrumpJr: ‘Angel mom’ demands Trump’s wall</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084912619390029824" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084912619390029824" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  06:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Spoke w/ President Erdogan of Turkey to advise where we stand on all matters including our last two weeks of success in fighting the remnants of ISIS</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084936400212963329" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084936400212963329" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  06:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;For decades</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084938160516169729" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084938160516169729" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  06:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....I am doing exactly what I pledged to do</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1084938164387508224" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1084938164387508224" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  19:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The rank and file of the FBI are great people who are disgusted with what they are learning about Lyin’ James Comey and the so-called “leaders” of the FBI. Twelve have been fired or forced to leave. They got caught spying on my campaign and then called it an investigation. Bad!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085144283437506560" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085144283437506560" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  20:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just announced that Veterans unemployment has reached an 18 year low</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085148593617555456" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085148593617555456" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  20:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Volkswagen will be spending 800 million dollars in Chattanooga</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085151045922234368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085151045922234368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  20:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A big new Caravan is heading up to our Southern Border from Honduras. Tell Nancy and Chuck that a drone flying around will not stop them. Only a Wall will work. Only a Wall</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085154110108848128" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085154110108848128" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  20:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Polls are now showing that people are beginning to understand the Humanitarian Crisis and Crime at the Border. Numbers are going up fast</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085156987183263749" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085156987183263749" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  20:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great being with the National Champion Clemson Tigers last night at the White House. Because of the Shutdown I served them massive amounts of Fast Food (I paid)</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085159285208858624" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085159285208858624" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  21:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @PARISDENNARD: I trust a rancher on the Southern border more than a liberal politician from Northern California https://t.co/mo4oWe1SnI&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085160070374195200" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085160070374195200" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  21:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @DonaldJTrumpJr: Worth the read. Jan 15, 2019  21:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @charliekirk11: No one accused Obama of being a Russian agent after he asked for “more flexibility” until after the the election</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085160630024327168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085160630024327168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085160738992373760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085160738992373760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  21:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @paulsperry_: BREAKING: Inspector General Michael Horowitz still does NOT have all of Peter Strzok&#x27;s and Lisa Page&#x27;s texts</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085160990919012353" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085160990919012353" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  21:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @paulsperry_: So...by the FBI&#x27;s post-Trump standards for C.I. investigations</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085163148678782978" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085163148678782978" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  21:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TomFitton: For the first time in a generation</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085164042791145473" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085164042791145473" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  21:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Why is Nancy Pelosi getting paid when people who are working are not?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085166206095630336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085166206095630336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2019  23:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations @ClemsonFB! https://t.co/w8viax0OWY&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085194521036546049" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085194521036546049" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2019  00:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great being with the National Champion Clemson Tigers last night at the White House. Because of the Shutdown I served them massive amounts of Fast Food (I paid)</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085207864224960519" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085207864224960519" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2019  20:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There are now 77 major or significant Walls built around the world</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085515276228153345" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085515276228153345" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2019  20:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It is becoming more and more obvious that the Radical Democrats are a Party of open borders and crime. They want nothing to do with the major Humanitarian Crisis on our Southern Border. #2020!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085519375224983552" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085519375224983552" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2019  22:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Left has become totally unhinged. They no longer care what is Right for our Countrty!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085900696539615232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085900696539615232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2019  23:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So funny to watch Schumer groveling. He called for the firing of bad cop James Comey many times - UNTIL I FIRED HIM!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1085915768003256321" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1085915768003256321" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2019  23:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @Lrihendry: @realDonaldTrump They are eaten alive by hate for our President &amp;amp; his voters!   They care more about illegal immigrants than they do for American citizens!   Look no further than CA re-directing money away from US citizens to illegal immigrants.   Thank you for putting America 1st Mr. President&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Jan 19, 2019  06:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be making a major announcement concerning the Humanitarian Crisis on our Southern Border</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086395559504764930" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086395559504764930" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SchnurreZueri: @sethweathers @BuzzFeedNews Sadly so many will never get the memo that it was fake!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086429693719572481" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086429693719572481" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just a son who loves his Dad. Nice! https://t.co/ZI4012Ld7S&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086431078280323072" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086431078280323072" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @johncardillo: I told you all that the BuzzFeed story was nonsense. https://t.co/gbTXPjpVtk&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086431672806068224" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086431672806068224" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @dbongino: We called it. FAKE NEWS!  “More Buzzfeed B.S.” https://t.co/aOIPJJu0vH&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086432126034214917" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086432126034214917" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SebGorka: &#x27;We will b protected by grt men &amp;amp; women of r military &amp;amp; law enforcmt &amp;amp; most importantly</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086438806461374464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086438806461374464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @dbongino: When are we going to start investigating the REAL collusion scandal? The collusion between the Clinton &amp;amp; Obama teams and foreign governments in the scheme to spy on the Trump team is the real scandal.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086439344628527110" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086439344628527110" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @dbongino: Latino Job Approval of Trump SURGES in Midst of Govt Shutdown Over Border Wall Funding https://t.co/HAqstQDGw5&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086439635570569216" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086439635570569216" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @parscale: This is just one of many fake news stories over the last several years. Sad so many journalists have lost their integrity. I hope @cnn and @msnbc step up and call this for what it is. https://t.co/LSrMYomaj3&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086440620640604161" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086440620640604161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  09:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: The entire premise of this story</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086441306841366530" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086441306841366530" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  10:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @LindaSuhler: Dear God</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086446694944903168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086446694944903168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  10:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/wjqVvTqeky&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086446833541570560" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086446833541570560" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  10:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @RyanAFournier: The reporters never saw the evidence. They went off of a source who said it was “credible”. This isn’t journalism.   Congratulations</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086447711048613888" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086447711048613888" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  10:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @ChatByCC: The Buzzfeed bombshell bombed. It blew up in their face and the rest of the fake news are casualties too.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086447730099216386" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086447730099216386" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  10:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @CarmineZozzora: By the time their fake news campaigns are fully exposed they’ve already moved on to their next fake news campaign.  A global real estate developer contemplating developing global real estate is just a desperate attempt to create their latest Trump scandal du jour.  #MAGA 🇺🇸 https://t.co/mopAsB2hYU&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086449105382113281" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086449105382113281" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  11:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Remember it was Buzzfeed that released the totally discredited “Dossier</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086458937002680320" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086458937002680320" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  11:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GeraldoRivera: At what point in fairness-after 2 years do Americans of good will say enough already? If the #SpecialCounsel had collusion don’t you think we would have heard it by now? This is history’s longest running smear job. Free @realDonaldTrump Reflect. Negotiate. Open the government.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086463880287715329" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086463880287715329" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  11:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GeraldoRivera: This is just the most egregious example of the rampant unfairness that has tainted this partisan witch-hunt from the beginning. The utter hatred for @realDonaldTrump has empowered a legion of back stabbers wielding flamboyant falsehoods to undermine @POTUS.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086463946041769985" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086463946041769985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  11:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Fake News is truly the ENEMY OF THE PEOPLE!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086464467481833480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086464467481833480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  19:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will be leaving for Dover to be with the families of 4 very special people who lost their lives in service to our Country!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086586403583074304" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086586403583074304" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  20:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;.@newtgingrich just stated that there has been no president since Abraham Lincoln who has been treated worse or more unfairly by the media than your favorite President</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086597047229300737" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086597047229300737" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  20:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Economy is one of the best in our history</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086607079308251136" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086607079308251136" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  21:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Many people are saying that the Mainstream Media will have a very hard time restoring credibility because of the way they have treated me over the past 3 years (including the election lead-up)</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086621837902184448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086621837902184448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  22:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Mexico is doing NOTHING to stop the Caravan which is now fully formed and heading to the United States. We stopped the last two - many are still in Mexico but can’t get through our Wall</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086626739835625474" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086626739835625474" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  03:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be live from the White House at 4:00 P.M.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp;
