Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086701998479736832" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086701998479736832" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  05:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/bJ81QkOObW&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086736152059625473" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086736152059625473" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  20:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Always heard that as President</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086966588752969728" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086966588752969728" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  20:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Be careful and try staying in your house. Large parts of the Country are suffering from  tremendous amounts of snow and near record setting cold. Amazing how big this system is. Wouldn’t be bad to have a little of that good old fashioned Global Warming right now!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086971499725160448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086971499725160448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  21:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Nancy Pelosi and some of the Democrats turned down my offer yesterday before I even got up to speak. They don’t see crime &amp;amp; drugs</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086974590310645760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086974590310645760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  21:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;No</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086977510225727488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086977510225727488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  21:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Nancy Pelosi has behaved so irrationally &amp;amp; has gone so far to the left that she has now officially become a Radical Democrat. She is so petrified of the “lefties” in her party that she has lost control...And by the way</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086980606955794433" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086980606955794433" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  21:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Nancy</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086984547856732161" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086984547856732161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  22:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wow</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086987568074424320" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086987568074424320" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  22:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Don’t forget</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086991976598245377" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086991976598245377" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2019  22:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you David! https://t.co/zsmNfTjEDR&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086995116496224256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086995116496224256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  02:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Media is not giving us credit for the tremendous progress we have made with North Korea. Think of where we were at the end of the Obama Administration compared to now. Great meeting this week with top Reps. Looking forward to meeting with Chairman Kim at end of February!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087051223310712832" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087051223310712832" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  02:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/yQkCrpooIT&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087051321511997440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087051321511997440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @charliekirk11: Breaking:  A new NPR/PBS NewsHour/Marist poll shows Hispanic-Latino approval of President Donald Trump’s job performance jumped 19 points in the past month</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087082259339976704" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087082259339976704" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: Spot on.  https://t.co/DnD5JlkdFb&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087082414734741505" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087082414734741505" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOP: “I commend the President for his leadership in proposing this bold solution to reopen the government</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087082777864998912" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087082777864998912" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPLeader: President Trump has put forward a serious and reasonable offer to reform parts of our broken immigration system and reopen government. The moment now turns to Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. The country is watching. https://t.co/IyHJ8QHRrt&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087082839089254400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087082839089254400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @marklevinshow: I strongly support President Trump’s immigration proposal today.  Pelosi &amp;amp; Schumer rejected it even before the president spoke to the nation &amp;amp; made his proposal. They’re radical know-nothings. Let’s hope some... https://t.co/GGOOA3518q&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087082975655854082" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087082975655854082" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @sendavidperdue: President Trump again spoke directly to the American people about the national security crisis at our southern border. @POTUS has listened to both sides &amp;amp; is still willing to compromise. All members of Congress should take this proposal seriously.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087085138960359425" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087085138960359425" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SenatorWicker: I support President @realDonaldTrump&#x27;s plan. I will absolutely vote for this proposal when @senatemajldr brings up the bill next week.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087085210179694594" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087085210179694594" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @LindseyGrahamSC: A fantastic proposal Mr.  President!   Let&#x27;s get it done! https://t.co/m8bzYGRLTw&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087085254781947904" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087085254781947904" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @VP: Today @POTUS proposed a common sense plan to secure our border</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087085332691062785" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087085332691062785" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  04:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @senrobportman: .@POTUS has laid out a constructive new proposal that contains the basis for a bipartisan agreement. It includes many of the same ideas I have been discussing in bipartisan talks over the past few weeks https://t.co/4TtkgFUvtp&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087085403037945856" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087085403037945856" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  07:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SenThomTillis: My statement on the President’s proposal to end the partial government #shutdown through a compromise on border security funding and protections for #DACA and TPS recipients. https://t.co/HDvTbKdXPE https://t.co/26bRmwjHyV&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087133179927056386" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087133179927056386" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  07:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @marcorubio: @POTUS offers to support 2 bills sponsored by Dems (TPS &amp;amp; DACA extensions)in exchange for Border Security (something Democrats claim to support) &amp;amp; the immediate response from Dem leaders is No?   I hope rank &amp;amp; file D’s don’t go along with this strategy of unreasonable obstruction&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087133284327456768" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087133284327456768" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  07:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SenJohnThune: My statement on @POTUS’s proposal to end the shutdown: https://t.co/VCO1vwzaC3&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087133341999083527" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087133341999083527" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  07:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @RepMarkMeadows: This is the latest and most significant step yet of POTUS showing his willingness to negotiate and compromise with Democrats on the issue of wall funding. At this point</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087133391911301120" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087133391911301120" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @JimInhofe: It is true and I&#x27;m glad to stand with you on this @realDonaldTrump. The Democrats need to come to the table so we can secure our borders and #BuildTheWall. https://t.co/KeNmbT8xQO&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087146063201533952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087146063201533952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SenatorLankford: The President offered a reasonable compromise today to reopen the remainder of the government</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087146194869121024" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087146194869121024" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @JerryMoran: This proposal</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087146518329606147" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087146518329606147" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SenJohnHoeven: The president outlined a compromise proposal to strengthen border security &amp;amp; end the partial government shutdown. Read my statement here: https://t.co/A7OghTq1Bs&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087146642241925121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087146642241925121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will do a fantastic job! https://t.co/YkcenJhzsK&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087147220971995138" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087147220971995138" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @BudgetGOP: TODAY - @SenatorEnzi Welcomed new @BudgetGOP members @SenatorBraun</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087147552133263360" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087147552133263360" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPChairwoman: So many accomplishments from @realDonaldTrump and his administration over the past two years! https://t.co/GL1QplJhoI&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087147767817031680" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087147767817031680" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thanks James! https://t.co/iTdCEEiiRv&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087149819280457728" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087149819280457728" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A truly great First Lady who doesn’t get the credit she deserves! https://t.co/Wc9bYtoLKq&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087150318079610880" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087150318079610880" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @VP: Honored to serve as @POTUS Trump’s Vice President these past two years</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087150719587811328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087150719587811328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  08:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @WhiteHouse: The historic results of President Donald J. Trump’s first two years in office: https://t.co/xznAzXbrq3&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087150774319230978" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087150774319230978" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  09:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;To all of the great people who are working so hard for your Country and not getting paid I say</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087159116538228736" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087159116538228736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  11:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to Bob Kraft</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087193843756347393" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087193843756347393" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  11:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @DonaldJTrumpJr: Maybe the left will one day stop trying desperately to destroy my family and especially @realDonaldTrump. Till then they will keep failing miserably while also undermining themselves and our democracy.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087196700253528065" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087196700253528065" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  12:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Curt Schilling deserves to be in the Baseball Hall of Fame. Great record</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087200167802163200" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087200167802163200" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  13:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“No President in modern times has kept more promises than Donald Trump!” Thank you Bill Bennett @SteveHiltonx&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087213958950465536" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087213958950465536" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  23:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Last year was the best year for American Manufacturing job growth since 1997</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087369882344349697" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087369882344349697" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  23:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today we celebrate Dr. Martin Luther King</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087374046805835776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087374046805835776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  23:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats campaigned on working within Washington and “getting things done!” How is that working out? #2020TAKEBACKTHEHOUSE&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087374469222547461" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087374469222547461" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  23:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: To all of the great people who are working so hard for your Country and not getting paid I say</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087374608922230784" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087374608922230784" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  01:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087405987479384066" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087405987479384066" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  05:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;China posts slowest economic numbers since 1990 due to U.S. trade tensions and new policies. Makes so much sense for China to finally do a Real Deal</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087469381586771973" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087469381586771973" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  06:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If Nancy Pelosi thinks that Walls are “immoral</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087472133230551040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087472133230551040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  07:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Four people in Nevada viciously robbed and killed by an illegal immigrant who should not have been in our Country. 26 people killed on the Border in a drug and gang related fight. Two large Caravans from Honduras broke into Mexico and are headed our way. We need a powerful Wall!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087494416347074561" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087494416347074561" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  07:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats are kidding themselves (they don’t really believe it!) if they say you can stop Crime</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087496320712093697" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087496320712093697" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  10:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Looking like Nick Sandman &amp;amp; Covington Catholic students were treated unfairly with early judgements proving out to be false - smeared by media. Not good</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087541961295314945" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087541961295314945" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  12:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @KayaJones: I want to show other celebrities who voted for @realDonaldTrump it’s ok to come forward. Better yet let’s show the world how many Americans stand with him. Bullies shouldn’t be allowed for almost a year and a half to bully us without cause. If you voted for him just Like or RT&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087571368361840640" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087571368361840640" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  20:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Nick Sandmann and the students of Covington have become symbols of Fake News and how evil it can be. They have captivated the attention of the world</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087689415814795264" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087689415814795264" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  20:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“The Democrats are playing politics with Border Security.”  @foxandfriends&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087690284027334656" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087690284027334656" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  20:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Without a Wall our Country can never have Border or National Security. With a powerful Wall or Steel Barrier</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087693453394432001" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087693453394432001" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  21:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;FBI top lawyer confirms “unusual steps.” They relied on the Clinton Campaign’s Fake &amp;amp; Unverified “Dossier</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087700192864944128" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087700192864944128" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  21:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Marist/NPR/PBS Poll shows President Trump’s approval rating among Latinos going to 50%</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087702686936510465" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087702686936510465" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  22:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Never seen @senatemajldr and Republicans so united on an issue as they are on the Humanitarian Crisis &amp;amp; Security on our Southern Border. If we create a Wall or Barrier which prevents Criminals and Drugs from flowing into our Country</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087723755898658816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087723755898658816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  23:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Last time I went to Davos</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087726599225688064" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087726599225688064" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  23:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The United States has a great economic story to tell. Number one in the World</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087726878981582849" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087726878981582849" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  23:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The reason Sarah Sanders does not go to the “podium” much anymore is that the press covers her so rudely &amp;amp; inaccurately</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087733867614781446" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087733867614781446" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  23:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Former FBI top lawyer James Baker just admitted involvement in FISA Warrant and further admitted there  were IRREGULARITIES in the way the Russia probe was handled. They relied heavily on the unverified Trump “Dossier” paid for by the DNC &amp;amp; Clinton Campaign</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087740160559730689" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087740160559730689" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2019  00:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...big Crooked Hillary law firm</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087743320988835841" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087743320988835841" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2019  08:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to Mariano Rivera on unanimously being elected to the National Baseball Hall of Fame! Not only a great player but a great person. I am thankful for Mariano’s support of the Opioid Drug Abuse Commission and @FitnessGov. #EnterSandman #HOF2019💯 https://t.co/reU1gKWHSQ&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087867453684834305" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087867453684834305" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2019  10:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Deroy Murdock</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087892911734382592" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087892911734382592" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2019  20:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great unity in the Republican Party. Want to</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088055980263424000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088055980263424000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2019  20:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;BUILD A WALL &amp;amp; CRIME WILL FALL! This is the new theme</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088058134713823233" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088058134713823233" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2019  20:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;BUILD A WALL &amp;amp; CRIME WILL FALL!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088058726794387456" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088058726794387456" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2019  02:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The citizens of Venezuela have suffered for too long at the hands of the illegitimate Maduro regime. Today</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088146315979251717" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088146315979251717" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2019  03:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Even Trump Haters like (MS)NBC acknowledge you “BUILD A WALL &amp;amp; CRIME WILL FALL!” https://t.co/bKIgmHUW5P&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088149393851760642" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088149393851760642" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2019  03:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“The Historic Results of President Donald J. Trump’s First Two Years in Office” https://t.co/AFnWWiLlCa&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088151799926874112" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088151799926874112" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2019  12:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;As the Shutdown was going on</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088288311922307072" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088288311922307072" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2019  12:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....alternative venue for the SOTU Address because there is no venue that can compete with the history</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088289916826648577" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088289916826648577" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2019  19:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A great new book just out</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1088399969038594048" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1088399969038594048" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div><script src="../assets/filter.js"></script>
